**Note:** sitemap_index.xml has been failing since 2024 — can be removed from GSC. The primary sitemap.xml is healthy with 294 pages indexed.

month1:5.doc:
## GSC Baseline — March 2026

### Performance (last 3 months)
- **246 clicks** | **25.6K impressions** | **1% CTR** | **Avg position: 11.5**

### Indexing
- **8K pages indexed** (mostly IDX listings)
- **29.7K not indexed** (8 reasons — likely IDX bloat from listing pages)

### Video
- 6 videos found, 0 indexed

### Sitemaps
- sitemap.xml: 294 pages, healthy
- Historical data goes back to 2019 — GSC was set up previously

**Next:** Document top 20 target keywords with current positions
